ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the model */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the model is active */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the configuration belongs to */,
  "epsilon" REAL /* Epsilon value for the configuration */,
  "fold" REAL /* Fold value for the configuration */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "settings" TEXT /* JSON object containing the configuration settings */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the configuration */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the configuration is active */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_metrics" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error metric record */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration the error metrics belong to */,
  "origin_err" REAL /* Origin error */,
  "marg_err" REAL /* Marginal error */,
  "marg_oneC" REAL /* Marginal oneC error */,
  "marg_eff_oneC" REAL /* Marginal effective oneC error */,
  "marg_avgC" REAL /* Marginal average oneC error */,
  "inv_err" REAL /* Inverse error */,
  "inv_oneC" REAL /* Inverse oneC error */,
  "inv_eff_oneC" REAL /* Inverse effective oneC error */,
  "inv_avgC" REAL /* Inverse average oneC error */,
  "inv_m_err" REAL /* Inverse mean error */,
  "inv_m_oneC" REAL /* Inverse mean oneC error */,
  "inv_m_eff_oneC" REAL /* Inverse mean effective oneC error */,
  "inv_m_avgC" REAL /* Inverse mean average oneC error */,
  "simul_err" REAL /* Simulation error */,
  "simul_oneC" REAL /* Simulation oneC error */,
  "simul_eff_oneC" REAL /* Simulation effective oneC error */,
  "simul_avgC" REAL /* Simulation average oneC error */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error metrics were recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error metrics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_metrics_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's information was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user is active */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing the permissions for the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration used in the experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the experiment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration used in the simulation */,
  "simulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the simulation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the simulation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the simulation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_metrics_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration version */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "settings" TEXT /* JSON object containing the configuration settings */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_versions_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., model, configuration) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model-owner mapping */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model-owner mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model-owner mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_owners_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_owners_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration-owner mapping */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration-owner mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration-owner mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_owners_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_owners_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_comments_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_comments_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_comments_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
